name: Bristol Ice Box Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the melted butter, crushed pineapple, sugar, and chopped pecans.
2. Line a 1-quart dish with a layer of vanilla wafers.
3. Spread half of the mixture into the prepared dish.
4. Sprinkle another layer of vanilla wafer crumbs over the top.
5. Repeat steps 2-4, ending with a layer of vanilla wafer crumbs on top.
6. Refrigerate for at least 3 to 4 hours or overnight.
To serve, garnish with whipped cream. You can also use CoolWhip if preferred.
